title: (Create) Smart Chutes Curvified
description: Slightly tweaks Create's Smart Chute to have more depth
body:
A very simple change that gives the smart chute more depth.


Requires Create of course

This uses the original Smart Chute from Create 0.5.1, and tweaks it to add more depth and adjusts the texture likewise. Credits still go to Kryppers for the original model and texture. 
This was intended and works for Create 0.5.1, previous versions of create can load the pack, but have minor issues.(noticed from testing in 0.5.0)

Check out my discord where we can chat and you can get updates on this and other of my packs: Discord
